title: First-Line Supervisors of Material-Moving Machine and Vehicle Operators
description: Directly supervise and coordinate activities of material-moving machine and vehicle operators and helpers.

tasks.text: Enforce safety rules and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret transportation or tariff regulations, shipping orders, safety regulations, or company policies and procedures for workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Resolve worker problems or collaborate with employees to assist in problem resolution.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with customers, supervisors, contractors, or other personnel to exchange information or to resolve problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan work assignments and equipment allocations to meet transportation, operations or production goals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine, measure, or weigh cargo or materials to determine specific handling requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain and demonstrate work tasks to new workers or assign training tasks to experienced workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review orders, production schedules, blueprints, or shipping or receiving notices to determine work sequences and material shipping dates, types, volumes, or destinations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Drive vehicles or operate machines or equipment to complete work assignments or to assist workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect or test materials, stock, vehicles, equipment, or facilities to ensure that they are safe, free of defects, and consistent with specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Maintain or verify records of time, materials, expenditures, or crew activities.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Requisition needed personnel, supplies, equipment, parts, or repair services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend and implement measures to improve worker motivation, equipment performance, work methods, or customer services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare, compile, and submit reports on work activities, operations, production, or work-related accidents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dispatch personnel and vehicles in response to telephone or radio reports of emergencies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor field work to ensure proper performance and use of materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend or implement personnel actions, such as employee selection, evaluation, rewards, or disciplinary actions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform or schedule repairs or preventive maintenance of vehicles or other equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compute or estimate cash, payroll, transportation, personnel, or storage requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist workers in tasks, such as loading vehicles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct workers in transportation or related services, such as pumping, moving, storing, or loading or unloading of materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan and establish schedules.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
